1-913-897-7865.conag (Public Relations) ConAg produces agricultural products In the US, Canada, Australla and BrazU. The company operates grain elevaton at 120 locations In 22 states and 35 flour mills In 16 states and three countries. Consolidated Agriculture operates 50 global trading offices In 24 countries and processing facUltles In Canada, Europe, Latin America, Malaysia, Australia and the US.
